infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AltFast uses your camera to scan meals and food barcodes so it can log calories and macros for you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AltFast needs access to your photo library so you can pick an existing meal photo to log calories.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: AltFast reads motion data to estimate your steps and active energy on Eat and Fast days.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: AltFast reads your steps, distance and active energy from Apple Health to track activity automatically.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: AltFast can write workouts you log into Apple Health so all your activity stays in sync.

plugins.cameraPermission: AltFast uses your camera to scan meals and barcodes.
plugins.photosPermission: AltFast uses your photo library to pick a meal photo to log.

plugins.cameraPermission: AltFast uses your camera to scan barcodes on packaged foods.
